channel.title: GuardDuty on The Hidden Port
channel.description: Recent content in GuardDuty on The Hidden Port

item.title: Amazon GuardDuty Setup: Findings, Alerts & SIEM Integration
item.description: Enable GuardDuty, understand finding types, set up alerting, and integrate with your SIEM. Step-by-step guide with Terraform and console walkthroughs.
